title: Signal in an active generate block causes compiler error `Can't find definition of variable ...`

features.name: generate_if_block_with_type_declaration
features.description: Code should include a generate-if block with a type declaration inside it, using a constant condition

features.name: variable_reference_from_non_generate_context
features.description: Code should include a variable access from a non-generate procedural block where the variable is declared inside a generate block with a constant condition
